script_text: The. You see this word in almost every book.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing.

script_text: I. The word you use for yourself.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing.

script_text: And. This word connects things together. Cats and dogs.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing.

script_text: 'On' and 'no.' They have the same letters in a different order.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing.
